Description:
Ballistics of Type-1 APFSDS-T round fired from the PTZ-89 120mm self-propelled smoothbore tank gun, based on the chasis of the 321 utility chasis.

Barrel Length:			6250	mm
Cartridge Length:			740	mm exterior (183 mm diameter rim)
Travel:			5525	mm
Charge:			10.33	kg
			9.33	kg ZT-14/19 19 perforated rosette prism
				14 mm length, 0.45 mm perforation diameter.
			0.994 	kg combustible cartridge.
Chamber Volume:			14.8	L
Chambrage:			1.75	(assumed)
As Designed: P.mcp <= 4800 kg/cm^2 (copper crusher gauge), Vg >= 1740 m/s
As Accepted: [copper crusher gauge]
T   m.v.   P.mcp
    m/s    MPa
-40 1675.5 404
 15 1731.6 458
 50 1773.6 492.5 

Reference：
 - 杨敏涛《可燃药筒燃气生成函数的建立及在高速炮内弹道势平衡解法中的应用》机电部202研究所: combustible cartridge 55.5-57.8x10^4 J/kg
 - 于正心《试论PTZ-89式120mm自行反坦克炮的总体设计》国营447厂
 - 陆祥璇《“两炮”火力系统总体论证》机电部系统工程研究所
 - 吴远林《ZT型太根混合酯发射药的设计与制造》国营255厂
 - 韦汉忠《火炮膛内电测压力值与铜柱压力值的分析》机电部202研究所
